title: Greek Yogurt Cake with Rhubarb (or Apple Variation)
steps: Preheat oven to 175°C.
Line or grease a loaf pan.
Mix yogurt + olive oil + eggs + lemon zest + vanilla + sugar UNTIL smooth.
In a separate bowl: combine flour + baking powder + salt.
Add dry ingredients to wet mixture. Stir UNTIL fully combined.
Prepare rhubarb/apples.
Layer batter and fruit in 3 layers, ending with fruit on top.
Sprinkle cane sugar on top.
Bake 55–60 minutes UNTIL skewer comes out clean.
Cool in pan briefly. Transfer to rack to cool completely.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
output: A moist Greek yogurt cake with tangy rhubarb or sweet apple, lightly caramelized on top and perfect with coffee or tea.
tip: Swap fruit seasonally: rhubarb in spring, berries in summer, apple/pear with cinnamon in autumn.

title: Easy & Quick Noodles
ingredients: Frozen meatballs (or any preferred protein: scrambled egg, fried egg, boiled egg)
Seasonings to taste: paprika powder, garlic powder, onion powder, ginger powder, curry powder
Kejap manis (or other liquid seasonings/sauces you like)
steps: Heat a little oil in a pan.
Add the frozen meatballs and mixed frozen vegetables.
Cook until heated through and lightly browned.
Season with your preferred spices: paprika, garlic, onion, ginger, curry, etc.
Place the desired amount of noodles in a large bowl.
Boil water and pour it over the noodles. Let them sit for a few minutes (depending on noodle type). Drain well.
Add sweet chili sauce and kejap manis to the vegetables and meatballs. Mix well.
Combine the noodles with the vegetable mixture. Stir thoroughly until everything is coated.

optional.label: OPTIONAL
items: Top with sesame seeds for extra flavor and texture.

output: A fast, flexible noodle dish packed with vegetables and flavor, perfect for busy days and easy to customize with whatever you have at home.

title: Gevulde Speculaas (Dutch Spiced Almond Pastry)
steps: Combine flour + sugar + butter + spice mix + baking powder + salt + milk. Mix UNTIL cohesive dough forms. Refrigerate ≥ 30 minutes.
Pulse almonds UNTIL finely ground. Add sugar + lemon zest + egg white. Pulse UNTIL almond paste forms.
Preheat oven to 180°C. Prepare baking dish.
Divide dough INTO 2 equal portions. Roll out first portion and place as base layer.
Spread almond paste evenly.
Roll out second portion. Place over filling. Seal edges.
Whisk egg yolk + milk. Brush top layer. Arrange whole almonds. Brush again.
Bake 40 minutes at 180°C. Cool completely before slicing.
output: Golden-brown spiced pastry with soft almond center. Best sliced when fully cooled.

title: Healthier Mac and Cheese
ingredients: 250 g whole wheat pasta (or regular pasta)
Salt and black pepper to taste
100 g spinach, chopped or frozen spinach
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat a large pan over medium heat. Add bell pepper + carrots + mushrooms + zucchini. Cook UNTIL vegetables become soft and lightly browned.
Add spinach. Cook UNTIL wilted. Set vegetables aside.
Melt butter in a saucepan. Add flour. Whisk continuously for 1–2 minutes.
Gradually add milk while whisking. Cook UNTIL sauce thickens.
Add cheddar cheese + herb cream cheese. Stir UNTIL smooth and creamy.
Season with salt and black pepper.
Combine pasta + vegetables + cheese sauce. Mix UNTIL evenly coated.
OPTIONAL: Transfer mixture to a baking dish. Sprinkle with extra grated cheese. Bake 15–20 minutes at 200°C UNTIL golden on top.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
output: Creamy macaroni and cheese packed with vegetables. A healthier comfort-food dish with extra flavor, fiber, and nutrients.

title: Homemade Moose Kebab (Crispy Oven-Baked Kebab Strips)
ingredients: 500 g minced moose meat (or minced beef as an alternative)
steps: Preheat oven to 175°C.
Place minced moose meat (or beef) in a bowl. Add all spices. Mix UNTIL fully combined and smooth.
Shape mixture INTO a tight, compact loaf. Place loaf on baking tray.
Bake 25 minutes at 175°C. Remove from oven. Let rest 10 minutes.
Slice loaf INTO very thin strips. Increase oven temperature to 225°C.
Spread strips on baking tray. Bake 5–10 minutes UNTIL crispy and browned.

optional.label: OPTIONAL MODULES
items: Add 1 tbsp yogurt for softer texture.
Add 1 tbsp oil for richer flavor.
Use lamb mince for döner-style kebab.

output: Crispy, flavorful homemade kebab strips — perfect for wraps, pita, bowls, or pizza.
tip: Serve in pita or flatbread with: salad, tomatoes, cucumber, onion, garlic sauce, kebab sauce, or chili sauce.

title: Quark Pizza Dough (High-Protein 2-Ingredient Dough)
steps: Combine quark + flour + baking powder + salt. Mix UNTIL dough forms. Knead briefly UNTIL smooth.
Roll dough INTO pizza shape. Add sauce + toppings of choice.
Bake at 200°C for 15–20 minutes UNTIL crust is golden and toppings are cooked.

optional.label: OPTIONAL MODULES
items: Add garlic powder or Italian herbs to dough.
Use whole-wheat flour for extra fiber.

output: A soft, protein-rich pizza dough made in minutes — no yeast, no rising time, perfect for quick dinners.

title: Kanelbullar (Swedish Cinnamon Buns)

sections.title: Dough
ingredients: 25 g fresh yeast (or 7 g dry yeast)
steps: Warm milk gently (not hot). Dissolve yeast in warm milk.
Add flour + sugar + salt + cardamom. Mix UNTIL dough forms.
Add softened butter. Knead 8–10 minutes UNTIL smooth and elastic.
Cover bowl. Let rise 45–60 minutes UNTIL doubled.

sections.title: Filling
steps: Mix butter + sugar + cinnamon INTO smooth paste.

sections.title: Shaping
steps: Roll dough INTO rectangle. Spread cinnamon filling evenly.
Fold dough (letter fold). Roll lightly.
Cut INTO strips. Twist each strip INTO a knot.
Place on baking tray. Cover and rise 30 minutes.

sections.title: Baking
steps: Preheat oven to 225°C.
Brush buns with beaten egg. Sprinkle pearl sugar.
Bake 8–10 minutes UNTIL golden brown.

output: Soft, fluffy Swedish cinnamon buns with buttery cinnamon filling and a golden, glossy top — perfect with coffee.

title: Roasted Sweet Potato & Chickpea Salad

sections.title: Roasted Vegetables
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Place sweet potatoes, chickpeas, and onion on a baking tray. Drizzle with olive oil. Season with paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well until evenly coated. Roast for 30–40 minutes, stirring halfway through, UNTIL the sweet potatoes are tender and lightly caramelized.

sections.title: Salad
steps: Wash and chop the lettuce. Dice the bell pepper and tomatoes.
Place everything in a large serving bowl.

sections.title: Yoghurt Dressing
ingredients: 1 garlic clove, minced or use garlic powder
steps: Mix all ingredients together UNTIL smooth and creamy.

sections.title: Assembly
steps: Add the warm roasted vegetables to the salad.
Sprinkle with crumbled feta.
Drizzle with the yoghurt dressing or serve it on the side.

output: A colourful, healthy salad with roasted sweet potatoes, crispy chickpeas, fresh vegetables, creamy feta, and a refreshing yoghurt dressing. Perfect as a light dinner or lunch.

title: No-Bake Midsommar Tårta
steps: In a large bowl: combine cream cheese + powdered sugar + vanilla extract + heavy cream. Whip UNTIL stiff peaks form. Stop mixing when cream holds its shape.
Select a serving dish or cake board.
For each cookie layer (4 layers total): dip each cookie in milk (≈5 seconds), arrange cookies to form the base layer, add an even layer of cheesecake cream.
Frost the cake: cover the top and sides completely with the remaining cream.
Refrigerate: chill ≥ 4 hours (preferably overnight). Do NOT add sprinkles yet.
Before serving: remove from the fridge 30 minutes in advance, decorate with sprinkles, slice and serve.

optional.label: OPTIONAL MODULE
items: Add a thin layer of (strawberry) jam between cookie layers.
Adjust cake size by changing the number of cookies per layer.

output: A soft, layered no-bake cookie cake with a creamy texture and milk-softened cookie layers.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook spaghetti UNTIL al dente.
Meanwhile: cook pancetta/guanciale in a pan UNTIL crispy. Do NOT drain the fat — this is flavor.
In a bowl: whisk eggs + Pecorino + Parmesan. Season generously with black pepper.
Drain pasta, reserving some cooking water. Add pasta to pan with pancetta. Remove pan from heat.
Quickly stir in egg-cheese mixture. Add splash of pasta water UNTIL creamy. Do NOT scramble the eggs.
Season with extra pepper. Serve immediately with extra cheese.
output: A rich, creamy carbonara made without cream — just eggs, cheese, pasta water, and crispy pancetta.

title: Patrch (Arabic Grilled Eggplant & Spiced Minced Meat Dish)
imageAlt: Patrch (Arabic Grilled Eggplant & Spiced Minced Meat Dish)

sections.title: Meat Layer
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
Spices (cumin, paprika, cinnamon, or Arabic spice blend)

sections.title: Topping
ingredients: Handful of almonds, toasted or fried

sections.title: Process
steps: Grill aubergines until skin is blackened and flesh soft. Remove skin and cool completely.
Cook minced meat in butter or ghee. Add tomato paste, salt, pepper, spices. Cook until thick and rich.
Mash or chop aubergine. Mix with lemon juice, garlic, tahini, yogurt, salt.
Spread aubergine mixture on serving plate. Top with hot spiced meat. Finish with almonds and parsley.
Serve with flatbread and fresh vegetables.

output: A smoky, creamy Arabic-style dish with grilled aubergine, spiced meat, tahini-yogurt cream, and crunchy almonds.

title: Easy Oven-Baked Potato Gratin
ingredients: 150 g bacon pieces (or any preferred substitute)
Mixed frozen vegetables (or fresh, any kind you like, no need to cut frozen ones)
steps: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Add mixed frozen vegetables to the baking dish.
Spread the bacon pieces evenly on top.
Add the potato gratin over the bacon and vegetables.
Finish with a generous layer of grated cheese.
Bake for about 40 minutes, or until the top is golden and the gratin is bubbling.
output: A simple, comforting oven dish that requires almost no effort — just layer everything in a dish and let the oven do the work.

title: Pulled Wild Boar (or Pulled Pork)

sections.title: Meat
ingredients: 1.5 kg wild boar shoulder or neck (or pork shoulder)

sections.title: Process
steps: Preheat oven to 150°C.
Cut meat into 3–4 large pieces. Mix dry rub ingredients and coat meat thoroughly.
Heat oil or butter in a Dutch oven. Sear meat on all sides until browned.
Mix stock + vinegar + soy sauce + ketjap. Pour into pot with meat.
Cover tightly with lid or foil. Cook 3.5–4 hours.
Check tenderness after 3.5 hours. If meat falls apart easily, remove from oven. If not, cook 30 minutes longer.
Shred meat with two forks. Mix shredded meat with some cooking juices.

output: Tender, slow-cooked pulled wild boar with smoky-sweet flavor and rich umami notes from soy sauce and ketjap manis.
tip: Serve in homemade pita bread with fresh vegetables.

title: Vanilla Quark Pancakes
steps: Place quark, flour, and eggs in a bowl. Whisk UNTIL smooth and lump-free.
Heat butter or oil in a pan. Pour small portions of batter to form mini pancakes. Cook 2–3 minutes per side UNTIL golden.
For topping: melt butter in a pan. Add apples + cinnamon. Cook UNTIL soft and lightly caramelized.
Serve pancakes warm with cinnamon apples.
output: Light and fluffy vanilla quark pancakes with warm cinnamon apples.

title: Tiramisu
steps: Brew coffee.
Transfer coffee to dipping bowl.
Add almond extract.
Whip mascarpone + heavy cream + sugar UNTIL stiff and creamy.
Select deep serving dish.
Spread mascarpone mixture (base layer).
For each layer of ladyfingers: dip ladyfingers in coffee (2–3 seconds), place over mascarpone layer, add new mascarpone layer.
Finish with mascarpone layer on top.
Cover dish.
Refrigerate ≥ 4 hours.
Before serving: dust with cocoa powder.
output: Chilled, layered tiramisu ready to serve.

title: Wild Boar Steak with Carrot Mash, Glazed Carrots & Roasted Pumpkin
imageAlt: Wild boar steak with carrot mash

sections.title: Carrot Mash
steps: Peel and cut potatoes. Slice carrots.
Cook together in salted water UNTIL tender. Drain well.
Add butter + warm milk. Mash UNTIL smooth and creamy.
Season with salt + pepper.

sections.title: Wild Boar Steak
steps: Pat steaks dry. Season generously.
Heat butter/oil in pan. Cook steaks UNTIL browned on both sides.
Add herbs in final minutes.
Rest briefly before serving.

sections.title: Glazed Carrots
steps: Peel carrots and cut into sticks.
Cook briefly UNTIL slightly tender. Drain.
Melt butter in pan. Add carrots + honey + salt.
Cook UNTIL glossy and caramelized.

sections.title: Roasted Pumpkin
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Place pumpkin on tray. Drizzle with oil. Season with salt + pepper + spices.
Sprinkle cheese + breadcrumbs.
Roast 25–30 minutes UNTIL tender and golden.

sections.title: Serving Suggestion
steps: Serve carrot mash on warm plates.
Add wild boar steak.
Serve with glazed carrots + roasted pumpkin.
Finish with extra butter or meat juices.

output: A comforting autumn meal with tender wild boar steak, creamy carrot mash, sweet glazed carrots, and crispy roasted pumpkin.

title: Oven-Baked Wild Boar Ribs with Braised Red Cabbage & Mashed Potatoes
imageAlt: Wild boar ribs with red cabbage and mashed potatoes

sections.title: Wild Boar Ribs
ingredients: 1 rack wild boar ribs (or pork ribs)

sections.title: Process (Ribs)
steps: Mix dry rub ingredients. Remove membrane from ribs. Rub ribs generously.
Marinate ≥ 1 hour (preferably overnight).
Preheat oven to 110–115°C. Bake ribs 3 hours.
Wrap ribs tightly with splash of apple juice/cola/water. Bake 2 more hours.
Prepare glaze: sauté garlic + onion in olive oil. Add soy sauce + ketjap + honey.
Unwrap ribs. Brush with glaze. Bake 1 hour, brushing several times UNTIL sticky and caramelized.

sections.title: Braised Red Cabbage
steps: Melt butter. Cook onion UNTIL soft.
Add cabbage + vinegar + sugar + spices.
Add apple juice. Simmer 45–60 minutes.
Add apples last 10–15 minutes.
Remove spices before serving.

sections.title: Mashed Potatoes
steps: Cook potatoes UNTIL tender. Drain.
Add butter + warm milk. Mash UNTIL smooth.
Season with salt.

sections.title: Serving Suggestion
steps: Serve ribs with braised red cabbage and mashed potatoes.
Brush extra glaze over ribs.

output: Tender glazed wild boar ribs with sweet braised red cabbage and creamy mashed potatoes.

title: Easy Wrap Pizza
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Mix ketchup + tomato paste + oregano + basil.
Place wrap on baking tray. Spread sauce evenly.
Top with bell pepper, onion, salami, cheese.
Bake ~7 minutes UNTIL cheese melts and edges are crispy.
Remove from oven. Finish with spring onion + fresh basil.
tip: Highly customizable — use any toppings you like: ham, chicken, mushrooms, olives, corn, spinach, pineapple, different cheeses, or extra vegetables.
output: A quick, crispy homemade wrap pizza with simple tomato sauce and your favorite toppings — perfect for a fast lunch or easy dinner.
